title: How Substack Creators Are Covering This Strange Markets Era
title_cn: Substack 创作者如何应对这个陌生的市场时代
summary: A panel with James van Geelen, Sam Ro, and Jasmine Sun.

title: Odd Lots: How Substack Creators Are Thinking About AI (Podcast)
title_cn: 奇怪的事情：Substack 创作者如何思考 AI（播客）
summary: We closed out our New York live show on May 28 with a panel that featured three of our favorite Substackers: James van Geelen of Citrini Research, Sam Ro, founder of The TKer, and journalist Jasmine Sun. They’ve all been Odd Lots guests before, and we wanted to get them together to discuss how journalists and analysts are supposed to cover this incredibly strange and highly pressurized moment in markets. Not only has AI basically infected every corner of the world, the media included, but there’

title: Israel’s North Seethes as Lebanon Front Tests Trump’s Iran Deal
title_cn: 黎巴嫩阵线测试特朗普的伊朗协议，以色列北部沸腾
summary: In Israel’s north, where the Lebanon front remains unresolved, Trump’s Iran deal fueling anger at both Washington and Netanyahu.

title: SpaceX IPO Shows There’s No Passive Investing
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股表明没有被动投资
summary: Everyone is always making a choice.

title: SpaceX IPO, Peace Hopes Fuel Rally in Asia Stock Markets
title_cn: SpaceX 首次公开募股、和平希望推动亚洲股市上涨
summary: Markets this week jumped on the AI frenzy, geopolitical breakthroughs and a packed calendar of rate decisions across the world.

title: US – Iran Talks Stall, Iran Asserts Control Over Hormuz, More
title_cn: 美国-伊朗谈判陷入僵局，伊朗声称控制霍尔木兹海峡等
summary: Source: Bloomberg, 4:51

title: Oil Stockpiles Near Danger Zone
title_cn: 危险区域附近的石油库存
summary: Energy markets expert and author of Oil's Endless Bid Dan Dicker says oil markets are underestimating the impact of ongoing supply disruptions, warning that global stockpiles have been drawn down significantly as millions of barrels per day remain unable to reach end markets. Dicker warns hosts of Bloomberg This Weekend David Gura and Christina Ruffini if inventories continue to fall, crude prices could surge from current levels to as high as $135 a barrel.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK's Starmer Faces Growing Pressure to Step Down
title_cn: 英国斯塔默面临越来越大的下台压力
summary: With escalating political turmoil surrounding the the UK's Prime Minister Keir Starmer, the PM has reportedly contacted cabinet ministers amid mounting speculation about his potential departure. Anchor of Bloomberg's Daybreak Europe Lizzy Burden explains to David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend how the situation appears to be reaching a tipping point. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Guinea’s President Doumbouya Announces Ban on Raw Gold Exports
title_cn: 几内亚总统敦布亚宣布禁止原金出口
summary: Guinean President Mamadi Doumbouya announced a ban on raw gold exports, in an effort to boost local processing of the metal and help the domestic economy.

title: Efforts Underway for Safe Evacuation of Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡安全撤离工作正在进行中
summary: Secretary-General of the International Maritime Organization Arsenio Dominguez joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the ongoing coordination efforts to establish a safe evacuation route for vessels through in the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Glut Bets Are Back in Play as Crude Sinks After US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 美伊协议达成后原油价格下跌，石油过剩押注又重新发挥作用
summary: A slew of all-but-forgotten niche option positions betting on an oil glut are coming back into play as crude futures slump following a peace deal between the US and Iran.

title: Soaring Profits in EM Build the Case for a Raging Bull Market
title_cn: 新兴市场利润飙升为熊市牛市奠定了基础
summary: For the first time in four years, companies in emerging markets are beating profit estimates, giving investors a fresh reason to believe the bull market is just getting started.

title: Fuel Shortages in Russia Amid Ukraine Drone Attacks
title_cn: 乌克兰无人机袭击导致俄罗斯燃料短缺
summary: Over 50 regions in Russia are currently experiencing severe fuel shortages. These shortages are attributed to long-range sanctions and targeted Ukrainian drone strikes on Russian oil refineries and ports, which have significantly reduced Russia's refining capacity by 20-30%. Bloomberg News Senior Writer Stephanie Baker joins Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the situation the world's second-largest oil producer finds itself in. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The ‘Mass Affluent’ Are Losing Their Allure for Wealth Managers Navigating AI
title_cn: “大众富裕阶层”正在失去对财富管理机构人工智能的吸引力
summary: Wealth managers keen to stay relevant in the age of artificial intelligence may soon find that clients with a mere $1 million in liquid assets are no longer worth spending human hours on.

title: US and Iranian Negotiators Begin Talks in Switzerland
title_cn: 美国和伊朗谈判代表在瑞士开始会谈
summary: Vice President JD Vance arrived in Switzerland to participate in high-stakes negotiations involving the United States, Iran, Pakistan, and Qatar, aimed at advancing progress on nuclear issues and regional security, including the Lebanon conflict. Despite a memorandum of understanding recently signed, some provisions remain unresolved, necessitating further dialogue. ABC News State Department reporter Shannon Kingston and Associated Press International Correspondent Philip Crowther join David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss what is ahead for the negotiators. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Keeps Flowing Through Hormuz Despite Iran Saying It’s Shut
title_cn: 尽管伊朗表示已关闭霍尔木兹海峡，但石油仍继续流经霍尔木兹海峡
summary: Millions of barrels of oil continued to flow through the Strait of Hormuz this weekend, even after Iran claimed to have closed the waterway again, as Washington and Tehran offer contrasting narratives over the status of the world’s most important shipping chokepoint.

title: Aluminum’s War Shock Blunted by Dark Transits and Chinese Supply
title_cn: 黑暗行进和中国供应削弱了铝的战争冲击
summary: The Iran war caused one of the biggest supply shocks to ever hit the aluminum market, but the runaway price surge that many were bracing for has been blunted by the ingenuity of producers from the Middle East to China.

title: Swiss Voters Set to Reject Stricter Neutrality, Early Poll Shows
title_cn: 早期民意调查显示，瑞士选民将拒绝更严格的中立性
summary: Swiss voters are set to reject an initiative to strengthen neutrality, according to an early poll, a result that could support keeping up sanctions against Russia.

title: A Stock Trader’s Guide to Navigating a Rare ‘Super El Niño’
title_cn: 股票交易者应对罕见“超级厄尔尼诺”的指南
summary: As concerns over the Iran war recede, stock investors are confronting another threat: climate risk, which is prompting a reassessment of bets across sectors from agriculture to insurance.

title: Fed’s Favorite Gauge Is Seen Showing Faster Inflation
title_cn: 美联储最喜欢的指标显示通胀加速
summary: The latest update to the Federal Reserve’s favorite inflation gauge is unlikely to challenge a growing consensus at the US central bank around the need for interest-rate hikes this year.

title: Brazil’s Lula Holds Lead Against Bolsonaro After Bank Scandal
title_cn: 银行丑闻后，巴西总统卢拉领先博尔索纳罗
summary: President Luiz Inacio Lula da Silva maintained his lead in polls on the Brazilian presidential election against Senator Flavio Bolsonaro, who is weighed down by his ties to a former banker involved in the country’s biggest bank fraud scandal.

title: Pointed News Quiz | Bonds, Streaming, Yogurt
title_cn: 针对性新闻测验 |债券、流媒体、酸奶
summary: David Gura, Christina Ruffini, and Lisa Mateo of “Bloomberg This Weekend” play Pointed! Wager your points, leverage your bets and answer wisely. A new quiz is available to play each week on Bloomberg.com (Source: Bloomberg)

title: History Repeating Itself in America
title_cn: 历史在美国重演
summary: As the nation prepares to celebrate its 250th anniversary, we can look back and see the recurring themes and lessons in American history. Host of the podcast History That Doesn't Suck and professor at Utah Valley University's Center for Constitutional Studies Greg Jackson joins Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss his new book Been There, Done That, How Our History Shows What We Can Overcome with hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini, which explores these moments in history. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran Sanctions Losing Efficacy
title_cn: 伊朗制裁失去效力
summary: In 2015, sanctions played a key role in bringing Iran to the negotiating table but now warfare has been the primary tool. Oliver Wyman Partner and Global Anti-Financial Crime Practice Leader Daniel Tannebaum explains to David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend how even if sanctions on Iran are lifted, businesses may remain hesitant to reengage with Iran due to lingering risks. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Warnock: Wall Street vs Main Street
title_cn: 众议员沃诺克：华尔街与大街
summary: Senator Raphael Warnock (D-GA) tells David Gura on Bloomberg This Weekend that the focus of the country should be on how local Main Streets are doing, not on well Wall Street is doing. Watch part one of Senator Warnock's interview now and tune in to Bloomberg This Weekend tomorrow for part two. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Netanyahu Faces MOU Blow
title_cn: 内塔尼亚胡面临谅解备忘录的打击
summary: While the United States and Iran have a new Memorandum of Understanding (MOU), Israel has been sidelined from the talks. Bloomberg News' Jerusalem reporter Dan Williams explains the embarrassing situation for Prime Minister Netanyahu to David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: South Africa’s Kganyago Warns Inflation Expectations Are Rising
title_cn: 南非的 Kganyago 警告通胀预期正在上升
summary: South Africa’s central bank governor said policymakers are seeing early signs of second-round inflation effects as underlying price pressures build, emphasizing the need to act.

title: Lawrence, Kansas Embraces Algerian World Cup Team
title_cn: 堪萨斯州劳伦斯拥抱阿尔及利亚世界杯队
summary: The Algerian national soccer team was assigned to Lawrence, Kansas for training and practice during the World Cup and have been met with an enthusiastic reception from local residents. Mayor of Lawrence Brad Finkeldei shares with David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend the joys of this grassroots cultural exchange and how it strengthens international goodwill. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Reindustrialize Summit: 'Build, Baby, Build'
title_cn: 再工业化峰会：“建设、宝贝、建设”
summary: At the Reindustrialize Summit in Detroit, industrial leaders, White House officials, and major investors convened to emphasize the critical role of manufacturing in reinforcing national and military strength. Axios Defense reporter Colin Demarest joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the messaging at the summit. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MOU Gives US and Iran Breathing Room
title_cn: 谅解备忘录为美国和伊朗提供了喘息空间
summary: Georgetown University School of Foreign Service Adjunct Professor Ali Vaez joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend and explains his cautious optimism for the recent Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) involving the US, Israel, and Iran. While Vaez acknowledges a deal within the 60 day timeframe is unlikely, the MOU allows for that timeframe to be extended and should be viewed as a starting place. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX IPO Sparks Anticipation for OpenAI and Anthropic
title_cn: SpaceX IPO 引发对 OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的期待
summary: The capital influx from the SpaceX IPO, which ended its first week of trading up 37% from its IPO price, highlights strong investor enthusiasm. Bloomberg Radio host of "Masters in Business" Barry Ritholtz comes on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the potential impact of this enthusiasm on the upcoming IPOs of OpenAI and Anthropic, expected to go public in the near future. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Burnham May Yet Rewrite UK Fiscal Playbook If He Becomes PM
title_cn: 如果伯纳姆成为首相，他可能会重写英国财政剧本
summary: After Andy Burnham took a giant leap toward becoming the UK’s next leader, focus is turning to how the team he’s assembling could shape the country’s economic policies.

title: Trump Seeks Iran Offramp
title_cn: 特朗普寻求伊朗出口
summary: President and Founder of Eurasia Group and GZERO Media Ian Bremmer joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss how in the face of the United States failing to achieve any of the war goals given at the beginning of the conflict, President Trump is looking to put Iran behind him. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-Iran Delegations Expected in Switzerland
title_cn: 美国-伊朗代表团预计将抵达瑞士
summary: Three days after President Trump signed an agreement with Iran, Switzerland is playing host for diplomatic talks with the United States, Iran, Pakistan, and Qatar in attendance. The Associated Press's International Correspondent Philip Crowther joins Bloomberg This Weekend with hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini to discuss who may be attending this summit and what a recent strikes in Lebanon could mean for any deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iraq Tells Oil Fields to Start Lifting Output After US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 伊拉克要求油田在美伊协议后开始提高产量
summary: Iraq asked operators of five major oil fields to boost production to prewar levels, targeting output of over 3 million barrels a day, after US-Iran deal that aims to fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Ships Told They Can Use South Hormuz Route With Signals On
title_cn: 船舶被告知可以在信号开启的情况下使用南霍尔木兹航线
summary: Ships can consider transiting the Strait of Hormuz along the southern route at any time of day with their signals on, a key naval information group said, as energy traders and shipowners look for clues about how quickly and safely Hormuz traffic can return to normal.

title: UK to Ban Social Media for Under-16s Starting Next Year
title_cn: 英国将从明年开始禁止 16 岁以下青少年使用社交媒体
summary: Big tech companies design their products to maximize user attention, often without regard to whether the content is beneficial, especially for children. Beeban Kidron, author of 'Users,' joins Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss with hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini the need for government intervention to regulate product design, parental responsibility in managing usage, and consumer awareness to make informed choices in the attention economy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s New CEO Must Rebuild a Design Team That Lost Its Way
title_cn: 苹果新任首席执行官必须重建迷失方向的设计团队
summary: Also: The 2027 iPhone and AirPods plans.

title: Amazon Advances Prime Day by One Month Amid AI Shift
title_cn: 人工智能转型期间，亚马逊将 Prime Day 提前一个月
summary: Amazon has moved its annual Prime Day sales event up by one month. The event is strategically important for Amazon as it aims to capture consumer spending, especially in a market where discretionary dollars are tightening and AI is increasingly influencing shopping behavior. Senior E-commerce and retail analyst for Bloomberg Intelligence Poonam Goyal explains the importance of Prime Day for Amazon to David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Millions in Brazil Get Fake Government Mobile Alert After Hack
title_cn: 巴西数百万人在黑客攻击后收到虚假的政府移动警报
summary: Brazil’s Integration and Regional Development Ministry and federal police are investigating an intrusion into the civil defense alert system that sent messages containing the word “misanthropy” to the mobile phones of millions of Brazilians.

title: Jio Platforms Plans $3 Billion Debt Reduction from IPO Proceeds
title_cn: Jio Platforms 计划通过 IPO 收益减少 30 亿美元债务
summary: Jio Platforms Ltd. plans to use part of the proceeds from its proposed initial share sale to repay its telecom unit’s external commercial borrowings of almost $3 billion, a draft IPO document showed.

title: BYD Rejects Claims It Violated Hungary’s Environmental Rules
title_cn: 比亚迪否认其违反匈牙利环境法规的说法
summary: Chinese electric vehicle maker BYD Co. said it rejected allegations it breached environmental rules in Hungary during the construction of its first plant in the European Union.

title: Iran War Gives Pakistan Its Biggest Diplomatic Boost in Decades
title_cn: 伊朗战争给巴基斯坦带来数十年来最大的外交推动力
summary: Throughout the nearly four-month Iran war, few countries were more visibly at the center of the efforts to end it than Pakistan, an unlikely actor thrust into the spotlight by US President Donald Trump.

title: Trump Tells Axios He Doesn’t See Anthropic as US Security Threat
title_cn: 特朗普告诉 Axios 他不认为人类是美国的安全威胁
summary: President Donald Trump said he doesn’t view Anthropic PBC as a national-security threat, days after his administration took steps to cut off foreign access to the tech company’s most advanced artificial intelligence models.

title: Nobel Winner John Jumper to Leave Google DeepMind for Anthropic
title_cn: 诺贝尔奖获得者 John Jumper 离开 Google DeepMind 加盟 Anthropic
summary: Google DeepMind Vice President John Jumper, who won the 2024 Nobel Prize in chemistry for his work on artificial intelligence, is leaving the company to join Anthropic PBC.

title: Aspen Disruption Triggers South Africa Contraceptive Shortage
title_cn: 阿斯彭中断引发南非避孕药具短缺
summary: A disruption at Aspen Pharmacare Holdings Ltd.’s manufacturing facilities has led to shortages of oral contraceptives across South Africa, according to the health department and a local pharmacy chain.

title: UnitedHealth’s $3 Billion AI Push Has Bots Calling Doctors
title_cn: UnitedHealth 斥资 30 亿美元推动 AI 机器人呼叫医生
summary: At UnitedHealth Group Inc., artificial intelligence reads aloud summaries of medical charts as nurses drive to patients’ homes. It listens to millions of customer calls to find the causes of complaints. One trial even has AI agents calling doctors’ offices to schedule appointments for patients.

title: Trump Opponents See Opening to Make Corruption a Midterm Issue
title_cn: 特朗普反对者认为腐败有可能成为中期问题
summary: Donald Trump has long avoided political damage for his own party from repeated allegations of graft and conflicts of interest. In this year’s midterm elections, Democrats are betting that they can finally exact a price.

title: US, Iran Begin Talks in Switzerland on Permanent Peace Deal
title_cn: 美国和伊朗开始在瑞士就永久和平协议进行会谈
summary: The US and Iran began talks on a permanent peace deal that seek to settle the issue of the Islamic Republic’s nuclear program and permanently reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Oil, Drugs and US Relations Hang in the Balance as Colombians Vote for President
title_cn: 哥伦比亚投票选举总统，石油、毒品和美国关系悬而未决
summary: Colombians are voting in one of the most polarized elections in the nation’s history, with the economic model, the war on drugs and relations with the US all hanging in the balance.

title: Starmer Ally Says UK PM Mulling ‘Realities’ as Pressure Builds
title_cn: 斯塔默·艾利表示，随着压力的增大，英国首相正在考虑“现实”
summary: UK Business Secretary Peter Kyle said Keir Starmer is reflecting on “political realities” as reports swirled that the UK prime minister may soon set a timetable for his departure ahead of leadership rival Andy Burnham’s return to Parliament.

title: Somali Opposition Backs Transitional Direct Elections Model
title_cn: 索马里反对派支持过渡直接选举模式
summary: Somalia’s main opposition alliance announced its backing for a transitional direct-elections model, a move that could help break the political deadlock that has fragmented the country.

title: Russia-Occupied Crimea Halts Fuel Sales After Ukrainian Attacks
title_cn: 乌克兰袭击后，俄罗斯占领的克里米亚停止燃料销售
summary: Authorities in Russia-occupied Crimea said they were suspending fuel sales at filling stations, limiting supplies to state services amid Ukrainian drone strikes on Russian refineries.

title: India Seeks US Tariff Edge Over Rivals Before Enacting Trade Pact
title_cn: 印度在签署贸易协定之前寻求美国对竞争对手的关税优势
summary: India is seeking a competitive advantage over rival nations before rolling out a much-delayed trade agreement with the US, after both countries agreed on the initial framework.

title: US-Iran Talks Set to Open as Vance Arrives in Switzerland
title_cn: 万斯抵达瑞士后，美国与伊朗的会谈即将开始
summary: US-Iran talks on a permanent ceasefire were set to kick off Sunday with top officials including US Vice President JD Vance converging in Switzerland, even after Iran issued a renewed order to close the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Albanian Protesters Demand Premier Quit Over Kushner-Linked Plan
title_cn: 阿尔巴尼亚抗议者要求总理退出与库什纳相关的计划
summary: Albanian protesters against the government’s support of a resort project backed by Jared Kushner’s investment company staged their biggest demonstration yet, with thousands calling for Prime Minister Edi Rama’s resignation.

title: Bolivia Begins Clearing Protests as Morales Allies Vow to Resist
title_cn: 玻利维亚开始清除抗议活动，莫拉莱斯盟友誓言抵抗
summary: Bolivia’s security forces began clearing road blockades after President Rodrigo Paz declared a state of emergency following 50 days of unrest that have severely disrupted the economy.

title: Petro Prods Trump Over Activist Arrest Ahead of Colombia Runoff
title_cn: 石油公司敦促特朗普在哥伦比亚决选前逮捕活动人士
summary: Colombia’s outgoing leftist leader criticized Donald Trump a day before a runoff election in the Andean nation that pits his preferred successor against a security hardliner endorsed by the US president.

title: Meloni’s Spat With Trump Shows Readiness to Risk a Bigger Fight
title_cn: 梅洛尼与特朗普的口角表明他准备冒更大的争斗风险
summary: Donald Trump has sparred with most of his fellow Group of Seven leaders at some point. But Italy’s Giorgia Meloni this week did something none of them dared: She escalated.

title: Iran Says Hormuz Closed Again as Talks With US Set to Open
title_cn: 伊朗称霍尔木兹再次关闭，与美国的谈判即将开始
summary: Iran said it has closed the Strait of Hormuz for shipping transit due to what it called Israel’s violation of a ceasefire, even as Pakistan said US-Iran talks were set to open in Switzerland on Sunday.

title: Pakistani Premier Heading to Switzerland to Join US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 巴基斯坦总理前往瑞士参加美伊会谈
summary: Pakistani Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif and military chief Asim Munir are heading to Switzerland to take part in US-Iran talks, the government announced Saturday, bringing one of the key mediators between the two adversaries to the table.

title: Peruvian Leftist Seeks to Void Overseas Votes in Tight Election
title_cn: 秘鲁左翼人士寻求在紧张的选举中取消海外投票
summary: Peru’s leftist presidential candidate Roberto Sánchez said his party will ask electoral authorities to void all overseas votes in the election, as conservative rival Keiko Fujimori edges closer to victory in the final stretch of the vote count.

title: Ukraine Officials Return Polish Honors Over World War II Row
title_cn: 乌克兰官员归还波兰在二战期间的荣誉
summary: Several of Ukraine’s top officials said they would return Polish state awards after the President Karol Nawrocki stripped his Ukrainian counterpart Volodymyr Zelenskyy of the country’s highest state honor, deepening a row over the commemoration of controversial World War II fighters.

title: Trump’s Fears About Economy Undercut US Leverage in Iran Talks
title_cn: 特朗普对经济的担忧削弱了美国在伊朗谈判中的影响力
summary: President Donald Trump said the prospect of global economic collapse was a big reason he signed an interim peace deal with Iran. That admission exposes a key US weakness heading into the next round of talks with Tehran.

title: Meloni Tells Trump to Focus on His Own Issues
title_cn: 梅洛尼告诉特朗普专注于他自己的问题
summary: President Donald Trump and Italian Premier Giorgia Meloni traded barbs for a second day in an unprecedented blowout between the two countries’ leaders.

title: Spanish Court Orders PM’s Wife to Face Trial, Surrender Passport
title_cn: 西班牙法院命令首相妻子接受审判并交出护照
summary: A judge in a Madrid court ordered Prime Minister Pedro Sánchez’s wife Begoña Gómez to stand trial on charges of influence peddling, corruption while conducting business and embezzlement of public funds.

title: Iran Resumes Kharg Island Oil Loadings After US Blockade Lifted
title_cn: 美国解除封锁后伊朗恢复哈格岛石油装载
summary: Iran has resumed loading crude from its Kharg island export terminal after a break of about six weeks, following the lifting of a US Navy blockade of its ports.

title: Iran-US Talks to Take Place Sunday in Switzerland, Pakistan Says
title_cn: 巴基斯坦称伊朗与美国将于周日在瑞士举行会谈
summary: Iran and the US will hold technical-level talks on Sunday in Switzerland, Pakistan’s Ministry of Foreign Affairs said.

title: African, Caribbean Leaders Agree Outline on Slavery Reparations
title_cn: 非洲和加勒比领导人就奴隶制赔偿大纲达成一致
summary: African and Caribbean leaders agreed on a joint approach to seeking reparations for the transatlantic slave trade, in a sign of a more coordinated way forward following a landmark United Nations vote condemning it as a crime against humanity.

title: Ukraine Targets Oil Refinery 2,000 Kilometers Inside Russia
title_cn: 乌克兰瞄准俄罗斯境内2000公里处的炼油厂
summary: Ukraine targeted the Tyumen oil refinery in Russia’s Ural region, about 2,000 kilometers (1,240 miles) from the Ukrainian border, extending Kyiv’s campaign against Russia’s energy infrastructure.

title: Vance Says He Expects to Leave in Couple of Days for Iran Talks
title_cn: 万斯表示他预计几天后离开参加伊朗会谈
summary: “I expect that I will leave sometime the next couple of days” to join US negotiators Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff in Switzerland for talks with Iran, Vice President JD Vance says in an interview with Fox News.

title: Local Election Victory Sparks Leadership Challenge in UK
title_cn: 地方选举的胜利引发英国领导力挑战
summary: Andy Burnham, former mayor of Manchester, has been elected to parliament and is expected to challenge Prime Minister Keir Starmer. Bloomberg New's UK politics reporter James Woolcock joins Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss this unprecedented election results with David Gura and Christina Ruffini and what Burnham vs Starmer could look like. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Equatorial Guinea Leader Reappoints Premier Days After He Quit
title_cn: 赤道几内亚领导人辞职几天后再次任命总理
summary: Equatorial Guinea’s President Obiang Nguema Mbasogo reappointed Manuel Osa Nsue Nsua as prime minister, four days after he and the rest of the central African nation’s cabinet resigned after failing to meet performance targets.

title: US-Iran Nuclear Talks Stall as Fighting Rages On in Lebanon
title_cn: 黎巴嫩战事如火如荼，美伊核谈判陷入僵局
summary: Fighting between Israel and Hezbollah continued unabated in southern Lebanon, casting fresh uncertainty over planned talks between the US and Iran to permanently end the war in the Middle East and curb Tehran’s nuclear program.
